mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM table_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId}
AND LOWER(table_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
ORDER BY table_name DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY table_name ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM table_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(table_name) = LOWER(#{tableName}) ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
